title: Onboarding - Login
scenario: Verify that a first-time user can complete the onboarding flow and login process to reach the Home Screen.
steps: Start the app for the first time, accept license agreement, tap Continue, Skip, then Continue.
Tap login — expected: login dialog with Cancel and Continue buttons.
Tap Continue — expected: login page with options to login/sign up via Microsoft, Apple, or Google, plus username/password fields and login button.
Finish login or sign up — expected: Home Screen is visible.
expected: Home Screen is visible after completing login or sign up.
